context.role: Echo in sleep state during designated sleep hours
context.screen_position: Center at x=64, y=60 on perch
context.usage_scenario: Active during sleep time (12-hour cycle); no care interactions available; spawns ZZZ particle effect

visual_specification.shape: Rounded body shape with head tucked into feathers; crest flattened; no visible eyes or beak
visual_specification.texture: Flat pixel art with no gradients; hand-drawn organic edges
visual_specification.outline: None; pure pixel art with color blocking

animation.description: Frame 1: body still, Frame 2: slight expansion (breathing in), Frame 3: slight contraction (breathing out)

visual_specification.details: Head is completely hidden in body feathers; body appears more rounded (approx 24px diameter); breathing motion is 1-2px expansion/contraction; eyes not visible

relationships.shared_with: Same color palette as all Echo states
relationships.differences_from: echo_idle (no visible head/eyes), echo_preening (static vs active grooming)
